refnamediv.refpurpose: Read an uncompressed grayscale DICOM image or multi-frame volume.

listitem.para: Path to a DICOM Part 10 file.
Scalar boolean. When true, the default, output values are transformed using DICOM Rescale Slope and Rescale Intercept.
Double array arranged as [rows, columns, frames]. A single-frame DICOM is returned with one frame.
Structure containing dimensions, stored-bit fields, pixel spacing, display window, rescale values, transfer syntax, modality, photometric interpretation, and selected study, series, and patient tags.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The native reader supports DICOM Implicit VR Little Endian, Explicit VR Little Endian, and Explicit VR Big Endian transfer syntaxes with uncompressed 8-bit or 16-bit MONOCHROME1 or MONOCHROME2 Pixel Data. Signed stored pixels, non-default High Bit positions, multi-frame images, and modality rescaling are handled.
JPEG, JPEG-LS, JPEG 2000, RLE, deflated datasets, color DICOM, and directory-based series assembly are not decoded by this function. Unsupported transfer syntaxes produce an explicit error.

warning.para: DICOM metadata may contain protected health information. IPCV returns selected patient tags in info but dicomshow does not place them on figures by default. This toolbox is not a diagnostic medical device.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: The sample is the anonymized multi-frame emri_small.dcm fixture from the MIT-licensed pydicom-data repository.

tr.td: Native uncompressed grayscale DICOM reader introduced.
